message: SuperSaas POST /users HTTP 400 — email-as-username rejected. Fixed: added slug-based username fallback strategy.
Blueprint JSON parse failed — model returned markdown code fence around JSON. Fixed: parseJson strips fences before parsing.
Pre-deploy validation failed: navigateTo('privacy') not in requestedPageIds. Fixed: legal pages whitelisted in validator.
FAQ injected below footer. Fixed: fallback injection now targets position before <footer>.
Live chat skipped — Tawk.to property creation returned 404 (plan limitation). Non-fatal, build continues.
